choices.text: Open3D / PCL: voxel downsampling for speed, RANSAC plane segment for ground removal, DBSCAN clustering for objects, ICP/NDT for registration. PointCloud2 = ROS format; read_points iterates.

ICP (Iterative Closest Point): registration_icp(source, target, threshold, init_transform) iteratively finds best transform. Or NDT (Normal Distributions Transform) for faster on large clouds. Standard SLAM building block.
